info.title: DiffScope Synthesis Platform API
info.description: DSSP HTTP API surface represented by this service. A server implementation can support a subset of the broader DSSP API.

servers.description: Default local server URL. The actual host and port are configured by the service.

get.description: Returns metadata for every registered architecture.
Returns metadata for one registered architecture.
Returns singers from every registered architecture.
Returns singers from one registered architecture.
Returns one singer from one registered architecture.
Returns the avatar URL for one singer.
Returns the background image URL for one singer.
Returns demo audio entries for one singer.

post.description: Generates pronunciation candidates for lyric input. Set stream to true to request newline-delimited JSON events.
Generates phoneme notes from pronunciation notes. Set stream to true to request newline-delimited JSON events.
Generates phoneme timing for duration notes. Set stream to true to receive newline-delimited JSON events.
Generates requested parameter values. Set stream to true to receive newline-delimited JSON events.
Generates encoded audio as a data URL. Set stream to true to receive newline-delimited JSON events.

SingerID.name: singer_id
SingerID.description: Singer identifier understood by the selected architecture.

ArchitectureList.description: Architecture metadata from every registered architecture.

ArchitectureNotFound.description: The requested architecture does not exist.

ArchitectureOperationError.description: The architecture metadata request was syntactically valid but could not be completed.

SingerList.description: Singer metadata from every registered architecture.

ArchSingerList.description: Singer metadata from one registered architecture.

SingerNotFound.description: The requested architecture or singer does not exist.

SingerOperationError.description: The singer metadata request was syntactically valid but could not be completed.

PronunciationComplete.description: Pronunciation generation result. Non-streaming requests return a complete JSON response. Streaming requests return newline-delimited JSON events; an error event can appear after the HTTP status has already been sent.

PhonemeComplete.description: Phoneme generation result. Non-streaming requests return a complete JSON response. Streaming requests return newline-delimited JSON events; an error event can appear after the HTTP status has already been sent.

DurationResult.description: Duration generation result. Non-streaming requests return a complete JSON response. Streaming requests return newline-delimited JSON events; an error event can appear after the HTTP status has already been sent.

ParameterResult.description: Parameter generation result. Non-streaming requests return a complete JSON response. Streaming requests return newline-delimited JSON events; an error event can appear after the HTTP status has already been sent.

AudioResult.description: Audio generation result. Non-streaming requests return a complete JSON response. Streaming requests return newline-delimited JSON events; an error event can appear after the HTTP status has already been sent.

EnvTagMatched.description: The supplied environment tag matches the current environment tag, so no response body is returned.

BadRequest.description: The request body is not valid JSON, contains more than one JSON value, or fails request validation.

PronunciationOperationError.description: The pronunciation request was syntactically valid but could not be completed.

PhonemeOperationError.description: The phoneme request was syntactically valid but could not be completed.

DurationOperationError.description: The duration request was syntactically valid but could not be completed.

ParameterOperationError.description: The parameter request was syntactically valid but could not be completed.

AudioOperationError.description: The audio request was syntactically valid but could not be completed.

id.description: Singer identifier understood by the selected architecture.
Singer identifier understood by the selected architecture.

stream.description: When true, the response uses application/x-ndjson and emits progress events.
When true, the response uses application/x-ndjson and emits progress events.
When true, the response uses application/x-ndjson and emits progress events.
When true, the response uses application/x-ndjson and emits progress events.
When true, the response uses application/x-ndjson and emits progress events.

id.description: Singer identifier understood by the selected architecture.

EnvTag.description: Previously returned environment tag. If it matches the current environment tag, the service can return 204.

ResponseEnvTag.description: Environment tag for client-side cache validation. If this field is omitted or empty, the client should not cache the response.

Mix.description: Per-frame singer mix data. Each value must be in [0, 1]. Each row must contain exactly singers.length - 1 values, and the sum of values in each row must be less than or equal to 1.

ParameterMap.description: Open string-keyed parameter map. Supported keys and semantic requirements are defined by the selected architecture.

AudioParameterMap.description: Open string-keyed audio parameter map. Supported keys and semantic requirements are defined by the selected architecture.
